title: miliusa globosa
intro: Miliusa globosa, also known as the globosa tree or golden berry tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Annonaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Miliusa globosa include its potential to treat fever, cough, and respiratory infections, as well as its ability to reduce inflammation and improve immune function. Herbal preparations of Miliusa globosa include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to make teas, tonics, and other medicinal products.
